name: tax-rate-explorer
description: Interactive 2025 US federal tax bracket visualizer

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && esbuild main.jsx --bundle --minify --loader:.jsx=jsx --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --outfile=dist/app.js --format=iife --target=es2020 && cp index.html dist/index.html
